description_long: This object is a pair of large, curved swords joined at the hilt, forming an X-shape when viewed from the side. Each blade is long, dark, and slightly curved with a distinctive cut-out near the base, giving them a unique and aggressive appearance. The blades appear to be forged from a dark metal, showing a matte, slightly worn finish. The hilts are wrapped in a reddish-brown material, likely leather, and feature a blue metallic crossguard with a geometric, angular design. The pommels are capped with a gold or brass-colored metal, adding a touch of contrast and durability. The overall design suggests a weapon intended for both display and combat, with a blend of functional and decorative elements.
description: A pair of large, curved swords joined at the hilt with dark metal blades, blue crossguards, and reddish-brown wrapped handles capped in gold.
description_view_0: Front view showing the straight alignment of the blades and the blue crossguards, with the handles and pommels clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the pronounced curve of the blades and the distinctive cut-outs near the base, forming an X-shape.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, highlighting the blade thickness and the back of the crossguards.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the curved blades and cut-outs, mirroring view 1.
attribute_blade_type: curved, double-edged, with cut-outs near the base
attribute_handle_design: straight, wrapped in reddish-brown leather, capped with gold pommel, blue metallic crossguard
